title: SoundHound AI to Acquire LivePerson, Combining Voice Agentic AI and Digital Messaging
text: SoundHound AI announced its acquisition of LivePerson in a definitive agreement, combining voice-based and digital messaging conversational AI capabilities. The deal creates an integrated omnichannel platform serving major enterprises globally. Key Financial Details: The transaction values LivePerson's equity at $43 million, representing a 22% premium over the 30-day volume-weighted average. After accounting for LivePerson's $74 million cash balance and debt considerations, the total enterprise value reaches approximately $250 million. The combined entity is projected to be debt-free upon closing. Strategic Rationale: CEO Keyvan Mohajer stated: This combination brings together two complementary conversational AI pioneers. SoundHound and LivePerson will define the future of agentic customer service. LivePerson's John Sabino emphasized that customers expect seamless transitions between voice and text channels: The artificial boundaries between talking and typing are disappearing. Customer Base Impact: The merged company will serve 25 Fortune 100 companies and operate across 30+ countries, including relationships with 12 of the top 15 global banks and leading telecommunications providers. Combined operations process approximately tens of billions of customer interactions annually. Financial Projections: SoundHound projects 2027 revenues of $350-$400 million minimum, with LivePerson contributing at least $100 million from existing customer relationships. The combined business targets $500 million in revenue opportunities. Expected Closing: Second half of 2026, pending regulatory approvals.
